items.name_cn:
🆕 M83505
A "Zippy Wallet" with embossed and printed Monogram pattern on a fluffy lambskin. Cut in feminine tones and finished with a gold zipper. Multiple compartments, pockets, and card slots to hold essentials like bills and coins, making it a functional wallet for daily use.
Size: 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm

items.name_cn:
🆕 M83500
Single zipper wallet series Zippy coin Perth wallet. Gpi Coin Perth coordinated with the Monoglam theme of the leather goods collection this season. Special coating creates a bold, metallic effect on cotton and Lurex jacquard canvas. Space-efficient compact design. Secure full-zip closure. Various pockets and card slots.

items.name_en: 🆕 【 M83226 White Flower 】 This Zippy coin wallet features the iconic Monogram canvas, known for its compact and small size that fits easily into pockets or small bags, while providing everyday functions. items.name_en: 🆕【 N40750 】For the Damierlicious special edition, the Victorine wallet is crafted in Damier canvas with a sweet and soft color palette. It brings a fresh and gentle touch to this compact wallet, featuring an envelope-style flap with a gold-engraved clasp. Inside, there are pockets for bills and coins, as well as six card slots. size:12x9.5x1.5cm C

items.name_en: 🆕 Top-tier Original M82959 Blue Denim Wallet Series Victorine Wallet Ams Enveluff style compact Viktoline Wallet.
